title: Project Bootstrap & WXT Setup
description: Initialise the repository with WXT + Vite + React 19 + TypeScript strict mode. Configure Manifest V3 skeleton (background SW, content script, popup, options, offscreen entry points). Set up ESLint, Prettier, Husky, pnpm workspaces, Vitest, shadcn/ui, and all dev tooling. Establish the path map (entrypoints/, lib/, components/, docs/). Publish first passing CI run. Coverage floor: 0%.
